prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 music-video still with large black letterbox space above and below a centered horizontal cinematic panel. Inside the panel, depict exactly one anime-style young woman with long soft pink hair, wearing exactly one flowing white kimono with pale pink cherry-blossom embroidery and red trim, plus exactly one red-and-gold obi sash. She stands in a dreamy nighttime cherry blossom garden under a deep indigo sky, shown from the waist up in three-quarter profile, gazing upward with a gentle expression while raising one hand toward exactly one glowing full moon-like orb balanced just above her fingertips. Surround her with blooming sakura branches across the upper left and lower right, drifting pink petals, and a luminous ribbon of pink musical staff lines curving behind her in an S-shape. Add a large soft-focus pink petal blur in the left foreground and another translucent pink blur near the moon for depth. On the right side of the panel, place exactly one vertical column of glowing golden Japanese lyrics reading 春を映し出した, with a warm light beam and tiny sparkling particles around it. Use a romantic Japanese fantasy MV aesthetic, soft bloom lighting, pastel pink highlights, high-detail anime illustration, cinematic depth of field, and no extra characters or logos.
